fitted_file.notes: Goblin linear fit R2=0.94. Demon power law fit R2=0.98. Both multiplicative per leg. Expand with more prop types and distances.

cards.title: How to read these cards
cards.subtitle: Published-style baselines used in PropOracle tools
bullets: Power: every leg must win; one multiplier for the full slip.
Flex: partial wins pay smaller multipliers; top row is n/n correct.
Goblin / Demon: easier or harder lines; estimate mode multiplies per-leg factors (see modifier cards).
Site rules change — log real slips to refine coefficients (data/payout_formula_coefficients.json).

cards.title: 2-leg Power (all Standard)
cards.subtitle: First-place multiplier 3.0×
bullets: All 2 legs correct → 3.0× stake (before Goblin/Demon adjustments).
Breakeven implied win rate ≈ 1 ÷ multiplier if legs were independent and fair (illustrative only).
